Republicans Block Democratic Subpoena for Elon Musk to Testify in House Oversight Committee | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Democrats on the House Oversight Committee attempted to subpoena Elon Musk to testify about his actions in reshaping federal government departments like Treasury, but Republicans blocked it, leading to a shouting match.[1]

signals.headline: House Set to Pass Democratic Resolution Overturning Trump Canadian Tariffs | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
House Set to Pass Democratic Resolution Overturning Trump Canadian Tariffs | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Due to GOP defections (e.g., Kiley, Bacon, Massie), the House will vote Wednesday on Rep. Meeks' resolution to rebuke Trump's tariffs, expected to pass given Speaker Johnson's thin majority.[2]  
Impacts trade policy markets; Democrats aim to force similar votes on Mexico/Brazil tariffs.[2]
